technical_replicate: the data were searched against human and S. cerevisiae Swiss-Prot database as specified in the database section.
experimental_design: we reanalyzed several of our own data sets as well as publicly deposited data sets to assess the presence of methylated peptides and the impact of different search strategies.
factor_value: to find dimethylated trypsin, we allowed dimethylation of lysine as a variable modification.
number_of_fractions: peptides were extracted in four sequential steps.
